overview: Moray Eel is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Ship Graveyard. 1 grades: Common. Base stats (Common): -10 HP, 15 physical damage, 0 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 1, MaxImpactEndurance 1. 1 attack, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Melee Attack at 80% ratio (120 base damage).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
